title: Diagnose a low edge hit ratio
description: Trace why responses miss: missing cache-control, key fragmentation, or uncacheable per-user content.
body: Steps: 1. Pull the CDN's HIT/MISS and cache-status logs. 2. Check whether responses carry cacheable Cache-Control. 3. Inspect the cache key for fragmenting params/headers/cookies. 4. Identify content that is per-user and correctly uncacheable. 5. Fix headers or key normalization for the cacheable subset. Rollback point: before changing key/Vary live. Validation: hit ratio rises for the cacheable classes and no private content becomes shared.
